hero.heading: Banking-grade
hero.subtitle: Your data protected with the same security practices as major financial institutions in Brazil.

pillars.title: LGPD Compliance
pillars.description: Platform designed with privacy by design from day zero. All data operations follow Brazil's General Data Protection Law.

pillars.title: End-to-end encryption
pillars.description: Data protected in transit and at rest with banking-grade encryption standards.

pillars.title: Multi-tenant isolation
pillars.description: Each organization operates in a completely isolated environment. Data, configurations, and workflows never mix.

pillars.title: Access control (RBAC)
pillars.description: Granular permission control by role, team, and resource. Each user sees and accesses only what they should.

pillars.title: Data stored in Brazil
pillars.description: Cloud infrastructure in Brazil with automatic backups, disaster recovery, and 24/7 monitoring.

pillars.title: Meta WhatsApp Business
pillars.description: Official integration via Meta's Cloud API. Guaranteed compliance with WhatsApp Business Platform terms.

infrastructure.heading: Infrastructure
infrastructure.subtitle: Architecture designed for high availability, scalability, and security.
items: Cloud hosting in tier-3+ data centers

compliance.heading: Compliance and Certifications
items: LGPD — Brazil's General Data Protection Law
